ProtectFallback.not_enough_permission: You do not have the permissions to perform this action

SignIn.meta_description: Seamlessly sign in to your account with our user-friendly login process.

SignUp.meta_description: Effortlessly create an account through our intuitive sign-up process.

Dashboard.meta_description: Vocion helps teams build, manage, and scale their business with contextual intelligence.

DashboardIndex.welcome_description: Your enterprise context platform. Connect systems, map business objects, and get grounded answers.
DashboardIndex.action_invite_members_desc: Add team members to your workspace
DashboardIndex.phase2_ask: Ask - Conversational workspace with grounded answers
DashboardIndex.phase2_search: Search - Find source material, records, and evidence
DashboardIndex.phase2_skills: Skills - Reusable business actions and queries
DashboardIndex.phase2_runs: Run History - Track skill and workflow executions

Connectors.title_bar_description: Connected systems that feed context into skills + retrieval. Authored per-tenant in context/<org>/sources/ (Phase 5 YAML shape coming).
Connectors.no_connectors: No connectors configured yet. Add your first connector to start ingesting data.

Objects.title_bar_description: Map canonical business objects across source systems
Objects.section_types_description: Registered object type definitions for this workspace
Objects.section_objects_description: Business objects linking documents across source systems
Objects.no_types_description: Define object types like Discovery Call, Deal, or Account to start mapping business context.
Objects.no_objects_description: Create objects to link Zoom transcripts, HubSpot records, emails, and more into unified business context.

Domains.section_domains_description: Knowledge domains group related connectors, objects, and skills
Domains.no_domains: No domains configured yet. Create domains to organize your context by business area.

Audit.title_bar_description: Track all actions and events across your workspace
Audit.no_events: No audit events yet. Events will appear here as your team uses the platform.

Search.title: Search
Search.description: Find source material, records, and evidence across all connected systems
Search.coming_soon_features_2: Filter by source, author, date, and tags

Skills.title: Skills
Skills.description: Reusable business queries and actions packaged for your team
Skills.coming_soon_features_1: Query skills: summarize accounts, find escalations, pull roadmap evidence
Skills.coming_soon_features_2: Skill catalog with input forms and output display

Teams.title_bar_description: Your AI workforce, by team. Every team has a lead agent and an accountable person.
Teams.workspace_lead_description: Runs the whole workspace — briefs you by consulting the team leads.
Teams.owner_inherited_tooltip: Inherited from workspace default — set an owner on this team to override.
Teams.ask_quarter: Ask how the quarter is going
Teams.consults_partial: Consults {consulted} of {total} teams — a team without a lead can't be reached yet.
Teams.no_workspace_lead_body: Your teams report to you directly. Name a workspace lead to get one agent that runs the whole thing and briefs you.
Teams.no_workspace_lead_hint: Set lead: in workspace.yaml, or load the sample workspace.
Teams.no_lead_warning: No lead agent — this team can't be consulted by the workspace lead yet.
Teams.ungrouped_hint: {count, plural, =1 {1 agent isn't} other {# agents aren't}} on a team yet — they still work, they just don't report through a team lead.
Teams.empty_body: Teams group your agents under a lead and a named owner — the way you'd draw your org chart.
Teams.empty_secondary: or author teams in your workspace YAML
Teams.seed_confirm: Load the sample revenue workspace? It adds sample teams and agents to this workspace — nothing you already have is removed or changed.
Teams.no_owner_banner: Set a workspace owner so every team has an accountable person.
Teams.error_body: Something went wrong loading the org chart. Your teams are safe — try again.
Teams.boundary_gated: {count, plural, =1 {1 skill waits} other {# skills wait}} for your approval — drafted, never sent alone
Teams.boundary_none: This team has no skills wired yet.
Teams.rail_lead_missing: No lead agent yet — this team can't be consulted by the workspace lead.
Teams.rail_lead_missing_hint: Set lead: in this team's file, under the hood below.
Teams.members_description: The lead is the team's front door — it coordinates the others.
Teams.no_members_title: No agents on this team yet
Teams.no_members_hint: Add team: {slug} to an agent in your workspace to put it here.

Runs.title: Run History
Runs.description: Track every skill and workflow execution across your workspace
Runs.coming_soon_features_1: Full run history with status, inputs, and outputs
Runs.coming_soon_features_2: Filter by skill, user, date, and status

Billing.current_section_description: Adjust your payment plan to best suit your requirements

CheckoutConfirmation.message_state_description: Your payment has been successfully processed. Thank you for your purchase!

Todos.title_bar_description: View and manage your todo list

AddTodo.add_todo_section_description: Fill in the form below to create a new todo

EditTodo.edit_todo_section_description: Fill in the form below to edit the todo

TodoForm.title_description: Enter a descriptive title for your todo.
TodoForm.title_error_message: Title is required and cannot be empty
TodoForm.message_description: Enter a detailed message for your todo.
TodoForm.message_error_message: Message is required and cannot be empty
